title: More Nonsense Limerick 92
content:
There was an old person of Dundalk,
    Who tried to teach fishes to walk;
    When they tumbled down dead, 
    He grew weary, and said,
    "I had better go back to Dundalk!"
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "More Nonsense Limerick 92", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
